description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring six horizontal drawers arranged in two columns. The cabinet is supported by slender, metal legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, giving it a light and airy appearance. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or integrated pulls. The finish is a uniform matte gray, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is plain, while the sides are flat and flush with the top and bottom surfaces. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors where sleek, functional storage is needed.
description: A sleek, matte gray cabinet with six drawers and slim metal legs, featuring a minimalist, handle-free design. Its smooth surfaces and modern style make it ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing six horizontal drawers in two columns, with slim metal legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the flush, unadorned side panel with legs at each corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back panel and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and clean side profile.
